statements.status_notes: Netty HttpObjectDecoder incorrectly terminates chunk header parsing at \r\n inside quoted strings in chunked transfer encoding extensions, enabling HTTP request smuggling.
statements.impact_statement: HTTP request smuggling via chunked transfer encoding in Netty HTTP codec. This is a server-side vulnerability requiring an attacker to send malicious HTTP/1.1 requests to a Netty HTTP server. Liquibase is a database migration CLI tool that does not run an HTTP server. Netty is a transitive dependency from Azure SDK, Cassandra driver, and MongoDB driver — used only as a client-side transport for outbound connections. There is no listening socket for an attacker to exploit.
